widgets_values: Do explore various samplers and cfg values (although we advise them to be kept close to 1)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Raw 35mm cinematic film still, heavy film grain, visceral practical effects aesthetic. Close-up of a pallid, reanimated man wearing round wire-rimmed glasses, leaning into the frame from the right. His stark white skin is highly textured with pores, smeared with dark grime and dried blood on his face and outstretched hand. Wet, vibrant green broad leaves cling tightly to his shoulders, neck, and head. He holds his hand up toward the camera lens, palm facing forward, partially obscuring his lower face. The background is a pitch-black void.

groups.title: Set prompts     -> use API Text Encode for more memory efficient run
